# services.meshtasticd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.meshtasticd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.meshtasticd.dataDir` | `absolute path` | The data directory. |
| `services.meshtasticd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Meshtastic daemon. |
| `services.meshtasticd.group` | `string` | Group meshtasticd runs as. |
| `services.meshtasticd.package` | `package` | The meshtasticd package to use. |
| `services.meshtasticd.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port to listen on |
| `services.meshtasticd.settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | The Meshtastic configuration file. An example of configuration can be found at <https://github.com/meshtastic/firmware/blob/develop/bin/config-dist.yaml> |
| `services.meshtasticd.user` | `string` | User meshtasticd runs as. |
